channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: America's Civil Wars: From Slavery to Modern Divisions
item.description: The article explores the historical trajectory of civil rights in the United States, framing its history as a series of unresolved conflicts between democracy and slavery, freedom and dictatorship. It...

item.title: Man accused of threatening ex-partner, assaulting her, and punching a dog
item.description: A 37-year-old man is alleged to have threatened to kill his former partner, assaulted her, and punched a dog before she managed to escape and alert a neighbor. Police were called to the incident in Go...
